name: Mister Demi after he hits the jackpot
description:
In the 4 minutes and 11 seconds following a jackpot, Mister Demi is effectively immortal.


JACKPOTTTTT HAHAHAHA

Info
Cursed Technique: Private Pure Love Train

Private Pure Love Train is a pachinko-themed cursed technique primarily applied through Domain Expansion. The technique is inspired by the romance manga series of the same name and manifests as a pachinko game where Mister Demi must align symbols to determine his fate.

  • While primarily bound to his Domain, Mister Demi can summon the visual effect indicators of the game, such as shutter doors, even outside of the Domain Expansion.

  • These indicators serve as momentary defensive barriers or timing-based attack cues, forcing opponents to move according to the rhythm of the game.

  • The more he plays, the more the cursed technique draws him into its logic, making his actions feel dictated by a predetermined sequence of events—a gamble with fate itself.

Domain Expansion: Idle Death Gamble

Idle Death Gamble transforms the battlefield into a pachinko-themed train station, where everything revolves around a game of chance.

  • The entire domain is structured like a massive pachinko parlor, lined with neon signs and mechanical sound effects.

  • The center of the station features Mister Demi’s personal pachinko machine, which he must play to determine the outcome of the battle.

  • His goal is to line up three of the same numbers—a task with only a 1/239 chance of success.

Effects of the Domain:

  • While the game is in progress, Mister Demi and his opponent are locked into its rules, forcing them to move according to the rhythmic mechanics of the game.

  • Opponents may find themselves restricted, unable to act freely unless they understand the gambling mechanics at play.

  • Each ball dropped into the machine corresponds to a different effect, ranging from massive soundwave-based attacks to randomized buffs and debuffs applied to both parties.

Unkillable Mode: Jackpot Bonus

If Mister Demi hits the jackpot in Idle Death Gamble, he enters Unkillable Mode for exactly 4 minutes and 11 seconds—the exact duration of the Private Pure Love Train theme song, "Admiring You", which plays throughout the round.

  • Limitless Cursed Energy: Hitting the jackpot grants Mister Demi infinite cursed energy, allowing his body to reflexively use Reverse Cursed Technique to heal any damage instantly.

  • Complete Invulnerability: Any attack that lands on him is instantly regenerated, making him temporarily unkillable as long as the song plays.

creator: Spellcaster
